subtitle: The Original IQ Option App
title: is back
text: Update our award-winning app to gain access to all of the trading instruments IQ Option has to offer:
strong: Turbo and Binary options, Forex, Cryptocurrencies and CFDs.
note: Please Note: Access to Binary and Turbo options can only be granted through an update of a pre-installed IQ Option app. In case the app has been deinstalled the newly installed version will only offer Forex, Cryptocurrency and CFD trading.
